title: rosa mollis subf. grandifolia
intro: Rosa mollis subf. grandifolia, a lesser-known species of the Rosa mollis plant, is a type of fragrant rose that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rosa mollis subf. grandifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving stress, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for anxiety and insomnia. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
